/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/blackhole_mono_particles.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/blackhole_mono_particles.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blackhole_mono_particles.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blackhole_mono_particles.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blackhole_mono_particles.dir/src/ParticleSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blackhole_mono_particles.dir/src/Grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blackhole_mono_particles.dir/src/BlackHole.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blackhole_mono_particles.dir/src/Framebuffer.cpp.o -o blackhole_mono_particles  libglad.a /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/libglm.a /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
